in: EVENT:look THEME:deep_mine ROOM:store TONE:cold DEPTH:42 EXITS:n,s,e,w ITEMS:none MOB:ember_wisp
out:
You stand in a mine store-room, tool-racks and empty ore sacks; a bone-deep cold presses in. An ember-wisp drifts through the dark, its glow pulsing like a dying coal.
Ways out: n, s, e, w.

in: EVENT:look THEME:deep_mine ROOM:vault TONE:cold DEPTH:44 EXITS:n,s,e,w ITEMS:none MOB:ember_wisp
out:
You stand in a rock-cut vault, a vein of ore glinting in the wall; a bone-deep cold presses in. An ember-wisp drifts through the dark, its glow pulsing like a dying coal.
Ways out: n, s, e, w.

in: EVENT:look THEME:salt_counting_house ROOM:hall TONE:watchful DEPTH:0 EXITS:n,s,e,w ITEMS:none MOB:none
out:
You stand in an echoing hall, salt drifted thick across the floorboards; the air feels watched.
Ways out: n, s, e, w.

in: EVENT:look THEME:salt_counting_house ROOM:chapel TONE:still DEPTH:39 EXITS:n,s,e,w ITEMS:none MOB:clerk-thing
out:
You stand in a salt-streaked chapel, its altar rimed with dried brine; everything is hushed and unmoving. A clerk-thing shuffles among the shadows, its ledger-fingers ceaselessly counting.
Ways out: n, s, e, w.

in: EVENT:look THEME:salt_counting_house ROOM:stairwell TONE:cold DEPTH:9 EXITS:n,s,e,w ITEMS:none MOB:none
out:
You stand in a narrow stairwell, its steps worn smooth by countless clerks; a bone-deep cold presses in.
Ways out: n, s, e, w.

in: EVENT:read THEME:salt_counting_house ITEMS:none MOB:none
out: The marks scratched into the salt-crusted surface resolve into fragments of an old ledger entry, though most of the sense has flaked away with the brine.
